markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and align on content strategy and website changes.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Positive Early Traction:** New content is gaining traction, with 156 sessions in the last 30 days and a 78% top-rank rate for the 2% of AI prompts Alex appears for.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** Educational articles will move to `/guides` (with 301 redirects) to preserve their SEO value, while the main blog will be repurposed for company announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [**Authority Building:** A new Reddit/review site strategy will build brand authority and generate valuable backlinks, a key factor for improving AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [**Website Fixes:** Donald will fix mobile formatting and implement a Webflow code block component, guided by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & AI Visibility

  - [**Organic Traffic (Last 30 Days):**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Total Sessions: 156](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [Engaged Sessions: \>50%](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Top Articles: "best AI recruiting tool," "bias article," "higher view alternatives"](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [**AI Visibility (Scrunch Data):**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Appears for 2% of tracked prompts (23 prompts).](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Ranks in the top answer for 78% of those prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
      - [**Insight:** High-intent traffic is low-volume but highly engaged.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**SERP Rankings (Google Search Console):**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - Queries ranking \#1: 21 → 38
      - Queries ranking \#2–10: 32 → 177
      - [**Insight:** Strong growth on the first SERP page.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic (Looker Dashboard):**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [Blog content is the primary driver of high-intent traffic from LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will add SEO opportunities from Alex's customer call summary doc to the content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Content & Website Strategy

  - [**Content Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "TLDR" section is repetitive and offers no new value.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [**Solution:** Replace "TLDR" with a "Key Takeaways" section. Donald will provide an example intro to align on the new style.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Website Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
      - [**Initial Plan:** Move educational articles to `/guides` and use the main blog for product announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
      - [**Revised Plan:** Create a new `/announcements` subfolder for company news.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Preserves the SEO value of existing blog URLs, which are gaining traction.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
          - [**Action:** Implement 301 redirects from old blog URLs to new `/guides` URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Other Planned Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
          - [Add "Book a Demo" CTA to the top nav.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
          - [Add a "Platform" item to the nav with product overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
          - [Move customer stories to dedicated pages.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

### Technical & UX Issues

  - [**Mobile Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [**Issue:** Formatting problems (spacing, fonts) on mobile.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [**Action:** Donald will fix; can use internal resources or external Webflow agency (Osomic).](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Code Blocks:**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**Issue:** Code blocks are not displaying correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide Webflow implementation guidelines. Donald will attempt the fix, escalating to Osomic if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
      - [Fix mobile formatting issues.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Implement the Webflow code block component using GrowthX's guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Provide an example intro to align on the new "Key Takeaways" style.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
      - [Implement the `/guides` and `/announcements` architecture with 301 redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
      - [Provide Webflow guidelines for the code block component.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Add SEO opportunities from Alex's customer call summary doc to the content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [Deliver more content pieces this week for review.](https://fathom.video/share/VYREYpZySaoc6GM7rnm-qk1ypucnCKs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
